summary: The Assistant re-sent a truncated message, confirming review of all provided materials. Reviewed content includes excerpts from `FULL SCRIPT Aisha ACTS 1-11.pdf`, covering the opening scene with QAZAR AL-ZAMAN, golden flare, dunes, a limestone ring-wall, a fading magical barrier, approaching caravans, an Entry Clerk, and Merchants (one with saffron, one with "bioluminescent" beetles). Image assets noted were `palace-exterior.png`, `aisha-locations.png` (with a broken hourglass), and character cards. The `Enhance Quality` file (and previous "Split Grid + Improve Quality") was identified as HTML code, not a functional skill; the Assistant requires plain text instructions for image quality enhancement as it cannot parse HTML. The Assistant is ready for the next project steps.
